# audit.connect

This checks that Posit Workbench has been correctly installed.

## Installation

To install the R package, run

``` r
install.packages('audit.workbench', 
                 repos = c('https://jumpingrivers.r-universe.dev', 
                           'https://cloud.r-project.org'))
```

## Usage

Running the test is straightforward

``` r
library("audit.workbench")
check(server = "https://www.server.name/")
```

# Package index

## All functions

- [`check()`](https://jumpingrivers.github.io/audit.workbench/reference/check.md)
  : Run UAT Checks
- [`check_bioconductor`](https://jumpingrivers.github.io/audit.workbench/reference/check_bioconductor.md)
  : R6 classes
- [`check_core_r_pkgs`](https://jumpingrivers.github.io/audit.workbench/reference/check_core_r_pkgs.md)
  : R6 classes
- [`check_cran`](https://jumpingrivers.github.io/audit.workbench/reference/check_cran.md)
  [`check_quarto_beamer`](https://jumpingrivers.github.io/audit.workbench/reference/check_cran.md)
  [`check_quarto_docx`](https://jumpingrivers.github.io/audit.workbench/reference/check_cran.md)
  [`check_quarto_html`](https://jumpingrivers.github.io/audit.workbench/reference/check_cran.md)
  [`check_quarto_observable`](https://jumpingrivers.github.io/audit.workbench/reference/check_cran.md)
  [`check_quarto_pdf`](https://jumpingrivers.github.io/audit.workbench/reference/check_cran.md)
  [`check_quarto_rsvg_convert`](https://jumpingrivers.github.io/audit.workbench/reference/check_cran.md)
  : R6 classes
- [`check_file_permissions`](https://jumpingrivers.github.io/audit.workbench/reference/check_file_permissions.md)
  : R6 classes
- [`check_git_cloning`](https://jumpingrivers.github.io/audit.workbench/reference/check_git_cloning.md)
  : R6 classes
- [`check_github`](https://jumpingrivers.github.io/audit.workbench/reference/check_github.md)
  : R6 classes
- [`check_python_pip`](https://jumpingrivers.github.io/audit.workbench/reference/check_python_pip.md)
  : R6 classes
- [`check_python_reticulate`](https://jumpingrivers.github.io/audit.workbench/reference/check_python_reticulate.md)
  : R6 classes
- [`types`](https://jumpingrivers.github.io/audit.workbench/reference/check_rmd_word.md)
  : R6 Quarto checks
- [`create_config()`](https://jumpingrivers.github.io/audit.workbench/reference/create_config.md)
  : Create test config
